name: California Public Employees’ Retirement System v. ANZ Securities, Inc.
question: 1. Does the filing of a putative class action lawsuit serve to satisfy the three-year time limit in Section 13 of the Securities Act with respect to the individual claims of other class members?
description: A case in which the Court determined that the filing of a putative class action lawsuit does not satisfy the three-year time limit in Section 13 of the Securities Act with respect to the individual claims of other class members.
